name: Linkedin
summary: Draft and inspect LinkedIn-oriented workflow artifacts through URI routes.
description: Linkedin is an if-uri urirun connector for draft and inspect LinkedIn-oriented workflow artifacts through URI routes. It is represented in the public catalog so the connector can be discovered, versioned and linked to its repository while implementation details are completed.
useCases: Discover Linkedin capabilities from the connector catalog.
Plan flows that use linkedin:// URI routes.
Install or track the connector from its GitHub repository.
